# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
- name: cors
  config:
    origins:
    - http://your-web-app.com
    methods:
    - GET
    - POST
    - DELETE
    - PUT
    - PATCH
    headers:
    - Origin
    - Accept
    - X-Requested-With
    credentials: true
- name: key-auth
  config:
    key_names:
    - api_key
- name: rate-limiting
  config:
    minute: 100
    policy: local
- name: cors
  route:
    name: your-route
  config:
    origins:
    - http://your-specific-route.com
    methods:
    - GET
    headers:
    - Origin
    - Accept
    - X-Requested-With
- name: key-auth
  route:
    name: your-route
  config: 
    key_names:
    - route_specific_key
- name: rate-limiting
  route: 
    name: your-route
  config:
    minute: 50
    policy: local
- name: cors
  service:
    id: your-service-id
  config:
    origins:
    - http://your-specific-service.com
    methods:
    - POST
    - DELETE
    headers:
    - Origin
    - Accept
    - X-Requested-With
- name: key-auth
  service:
    id: your-service-id
  config: 
    key_names:
    - service_specific_key
- name: rate-limiting
  service: 
    id: your-service-id
  config:
    minute: 20
    policy: local
